business.name: Kim A Tailor
business.tagline: A better fit, while you wait.

payments.notes: Demo build — every payment link is a disabled '#'. A live client site would use client-owned Stripe Payment Links (https://buy.stripe.com/...). Card data flows to Stripe, never to this site or the agency.

meta.disclaimer: Concept preview — not affiliated with Kim A Tailor.
meta.notes: All branding (colors, fonts) lives in assets/css/custom.css as CSS custom properties. Variation B: modern alterations studio — charcoal + warm stone + slate-teal.
